mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ledger_entries WHERE payment_id = #{paymentId} ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT COALESCE( (SELECT balance_after FROM ledger_entries WHERE account_id = #{accountId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1), 0)
SELECT * FROM ledger_entries WHERE created_at >= CONCAT(#{from}, ' 00:00:00') AND created_at <= CONCAT(#{to}, ' 23:59:59') ORDER BY created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ledger_entries (payment_id, account_id, entry_type, amount, balance_after, description, reference_type, reference_id) VALUES (#{paymentId}, #{accountId}, #{entryType}, #{amount}, #{balanceAfter}, #{description}, #{referenceType}, #{referenceId})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ledger_entries WHERE account_id = #{accountId}
